case_title: LEE, SAMMY et al vs. CAMPBELL, GLEN JAMES et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD, CALENDAR OF JUL-06-1993, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER COUNSEL TO PREPARE ORDER - INCLUDING HAVING GIVEN NOTICE BY LETTER AND IN THIS MOTION OF THE 7/6/93 STATUS CONFERENCE & CONSEQUENCE OF DISMISSAL(REPRESENTED SAMMY LEE INTENDED TO DISMISS BUT NOT CONFIRMED AS TO OTHER PLAINTIFFS).
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO W/D AS ATTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, SAMMY LEE, JEAN LEE, LAI-HUNG LEE, JOHN LEE, JOSEPH
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, SAMMY LEE, JEAN LEE, LAI-HUNG LEE, JOHN LEE, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPBELL, GLEN JAMES HEIT, ANNE CAROL SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-05-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-08-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-15-1993
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-05-1993, CONTINUED TO JUL-06-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, SAMMY LEE, JEAN LEE, LAI-HUNG LEE, JOHN LEE, JOSEPH HEARING SET FOR JUL-06-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-06-1993, CONTINUED TO AUG-20-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
ORDER TO WITHDRAW AS ATTORNEY OF RECORD: DEVIN MICHAEL D WITHDRAWN, REPLACED BY PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFFS
NOTICE OF ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO WITHDRAW AS ATTORNEY FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, SAMMY LEE, JEAN LEE, LAI-HUNG LEE, JOHN LEE, JOSEPH

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-20-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON AUG-20-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES. HEARING SET FOR SEP-20-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
